---
title: "Duration字段清洗"
author: "数据分析师"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(stringr)
```

## 1. 读取数据

```{r load_data}
# 读取原始电影数据
movies <- read.csv("netflix_movies_detailed_up_to_2025.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# 读取combined数据
combined <- read.csv("combined_movies_data.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# 显示数据基本信息
cat("原始电影数据维度：", dim(movies), "\n")
cat("Combined数据维度：", dim(combined), "\n")
```

## 2. 处理Duration格式

```{r process_duration}
# 从combined数据中提取duration信息
combined$duration <- sapply(combined$Duration, function(x) {
  if(is.na(x)) return(NA)
  hours <- as.numeric(str_extract(x, "\\d+(?=h)"))
  mins <- as.numeric(str_extract(x, "\\d+(?=m)"))
  if(is.na(hours)) hours <- 0
  if(is.na(mins)) mins <- 0
  return(hours * 60 + mins)
})

# 创建title和duration的映射
duration_map <- combined %>%
  select(Title, duration) %>%
  distinct()

# 显示映射示例
cat("Duration映射示例：\n")
print(head(duration_map))
```

## 3. 更新电影数据

```{r update_movies}
# 使用title匹配更新duration
movies_updated <- movies %>%
  left_join(duration_map, by = c("title" = "Title")) %>%
  mutate(duration = coalesce(duration.y, duration.x)) %>%
  select(-duration.x, -duration.y)

# 检查更新结果
cat("更新前duration示例：\n")
print(head(movies$duration))
cat("\n更新后duration示例：\n")
print(head(movies_updated$duration))

# 统计更新情况
cat("\n成功更新的记录数：", sum(!is.na(movies_updated$duration)), "\n")
cat("未更新的记录数：", sum(is.na(movies_updated$duration)), "\n")
```

## 4. 保存更新后的数据

```{r save_data}
# 保存更新后的数据
write.csv(movies_updated, "netflix_movies_detailed_up_to_2025.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```
